englishDefinition: State your opinion clearly; In my view public transport is essential.
chineseTranslation: 清楚表達自己的觀點；依我看……

englishDefinition: Give your main position; I believe that the policy is helpful.
chineseTranslation: 提出主要立場；我認為……

englishDefinition: Show agreement with an idea; I agree that cost is important.
chineseTranslation: 表示同意某個觀點

englishDefinition: Agree with a person and add a reason; I agree with Ana because time is limited.
chineseTranslation: 同意某人的看法並補充理由

englishDefinition: Show partial agreement before giving a different point
chineseTranslation: 先表示部分同意再提出不同觀點

englishDefinition: Recognize an idea before politely disagreeing
chineseTranslation: 先承認對方觀點再禮貌提出不同意見

englishDefinition: Introduce your strongest reason; The main reason is that it saves time.
chineseTranslation: 引出最主要的理由

englishDefinition: Explain the reason for the previous statement; This is because buses are cheaper.
chineseTranslation: 解釋上一句的原因

englishDefinition: Add a second supporting reason
chineseTranslation: 加入第二個支持理由

englishDefinition: Introduce a situation that proves your point; This is especially clear when costs rise.
chineseTranslation: 引出能證明觀點的具體情況

englishDefinition: Introduce a clear real or imagined example
chineseTranslation: 引出清楚的真實或假設例子

englishDefinition: Explain a possible result; This can lead to lower costs.
chineseTranslation: 說明可能產生的結果

englishDefinition: Explain a possible benefit; This may help students focus.
chineseTranslation: 說明可能帶來的好處

englishDefinition: Explain a possible problem; This may cause delays.
chineseTranslation: 說明可能造成的問題

englishDefinition: State the most important contrast; A key difference is that buses cost less.
chineseTranslation: 指出兩者之間最重要的差異

englishDefinition: Introduce a different side of the issue
chineseTranslation: 引出議題的另一面

englishDefinition: Show that the answer changes with the situation; It depends on the cost.
chineseTranslation: 表示答案會依情況而改變

englishDefinition: Avoid making a claim that is too general
chineseTranslation: 避免把主張說得過於絕對

englishDefinition: Introduce a factor that should not be ignored
chineseTranslation: 引出不應忽略的考量因素

englishDefinition: Offer one practical way to solve a problem
chineseTranslation: 提出一個可行的解決方法

englishDefinition: Summarize the support for your position
chineseTranslation: 總結支持自己立場的理由

englishDefinition: State a conclusion based on your reasons
chineseTranslation: 根據前述理由提出結論
